Alger Wilson.primary_clothing: Captain's uniform of the 'Blue Avenger', suited for sea travel.
Alger Wilson.face_description: Rough face with a stoic and solemn expression.
Alger Wilson.visual_anchor: early 30s male, weathered skin, dark messy hair, wearing a robe embroidered with lightning patterns, holding a quirky-shaped glass bottle
Alger Wilson.color_palette: deep sea blue, silver, dark grey
Alger Wilson.distinguishing_features: Hexagonal crystal-like snowflake absorbed into his palm
Alger Wilson.source_notes: Text describes his 'rough face' and confirms him as the captain of the Blue Avenger.

Jack.primary_clothing: Simple Victorian child's attire, likely a linen shirt and dark trousers, slightly worn from orphanage life
Jack.face_description: Round, youthful face with large, fearful eyes and soft, innocent features.
Jack.visual_anchor: 8-year-old boy with soft yellow hair and fearful blue eyes, wearing simple Victorian child's clothing.
Jack.color_palette: soft yellow, linen white, sky blue, charcoal grey
Jack.source_notes: Appearance and age explicitly described in the chapter text during the sailboat scene.

Jack's Father.primary_clothing: Heavy black robes with deep shadows, adventurer-style travel gear underneath.
Jack's Father.face_description: Extremely sharp and chiseled jawline, resembling a stone sculpture; eyes often unfocused as if listening.
Jack's Father.visual_anchor: Mid-30s male in black robes with a sculptural chiseled jawline, holding a listening pose while black shards protrude from his skin.
Jack's Father.color_palette: obsidian black, shadow grey, pale ivory, void purple
Jack's Father.distinguishing_features: Unforgettable chiseled jawline; skin protrudes black shards when losing control; constant listening pose.
Jack's Father.source_notes: Described as a Listener from the Aurora Order; sculptural jawline and physical transformation explicitly mentioned.

Klein Moretti.eye_color: brown (turns deep black during divination or Cogitation)
Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: Silk hat, black Victorian suit, holding a black cane
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Hears illusory whispers of 'Hornacis... Flegrea...' when near Antigonus-related locations
Klein Moretti.accessories: Dark gold member cufflinks with Hermes root word for 'fortune-teller' inscribed, topaz pendant hanging from his sleeve
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Details on his new club membership items and tools.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.primary_clothing: Classic robe or suit, topped with a round felt hat.
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Believes in temperance to avoid loss of control; skilled in 'luck' based ritual magic.
Old Neil.source_notes: Discusses Mystery Pryer philosophy and wears a round felt hat while out.

Dunn Smith.eye_color: deep gray (appearing abnormally deep in darkness)
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.accessories: gold-inlaid cane, strange revolver with a long and thick barrel
Dunn Smith.role: High-ranking inspector (Police Department) / Captain of Nighthawks
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Confirmed to be on the police department's roster as a high-ranking inspector with a corresponding salary.

Ray Bieber.primary_clothing: Victorian middle-class attire, dark waistcoat and white shirt
Ray Bieber.face_description: Recessed eyes, a tall nose bridge, and a clearly sagging philtrum.
Ray Bieber.visual_anchor: 30-year-old male with natural curly short black hair, deep blue eyes, a tall nose bridge, and a sagging philtrum, featuring a ceramic tooth implant on the left side of his mouth.
Ray Bieber.color_palette: black, deep blue, ceramic white, charcoal grey
Ray Bieber.distinguishing_features: fully ceramic tooth implant on the left of his mouth; sagging philtrum
Ray Bieber.source_notes: Portrait drawn by Old Neil via ritual magic; neighbors confirmed his age and trade.

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Text describes her as 'brown-haired' and mentions her changing into a cream-colored dress the next morning.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Chapter 47 describes her arriving at work in a light-green dress with coiled hair and a handbag.

Angelica.face_description: Beautiful face with soft features and a pleasant smile.
Angelica.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, beautiful face with a pleasant smile, wearing a modest elegant Victorian dress
Angelica.source_notes: Text explicitly refers to her as 'the beautiful Angelica'.

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: mid-30s male, slightly dark skin, soft light yellow hair, dark green eyes, wearing a white shirt and black vest with a monocle
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: He has recovered from his illness and now believes Klein is a 'magical doctor'.
